title: pseudognaphalium glandulosum
intro: Pseudognaphalium glandulosum, also known as sticky everlasting or glandular rabbit's tobacco, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium glandulosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Pseudognaphalium glandulosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which have been used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
